title: Fundraising Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities to solicit and maintain funds for special projects or nonprofit organizations.

tasks.text: Develop strategies to encourage new or increased contributions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop fundraising activity plans that maximize participation or contributions and minimize costs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and direct special events for fundraising, such as silent auctions, dances, golf events, or walks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish goals for soliciting funds, develop policies for collection and safeguarding of contributions, and coordinate disbursement of funds.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish and maintain effective working relationships with clients, government officials, and media representatives and use these relationships to develop new fundraising opportunities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile or develop materials to submit to granting or other funding organizations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contact corporate representatives, government officials, or community leaders to increase awareness of organizational causes, activities, or needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct research to identify the goals, net worth, charitable donation history, or other data related to potential donors, potential investors, or general donor markets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write interesting and effective press releases, prepare information for media kits, and develop and maintain company internet or intranet Web pages.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Formulate policies and procedures related to fundraising programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assign, supervise, and review the activities of fundraising staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate advertising and promotion programs for compatibility with fundraising efforts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Design and edit promotional publications, such as brochures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct activities of external agencies, establishments, or departments that develop and implement fundraising strategies and programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Produce films and other video products, regulate their distribution, and operate film library.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
